ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nominees" (
  "nominee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each nominee */,
  "nominee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the nominee */,
  "nomination_date" TEXT /* Date the nominee was nominated */,
  "confirmation_date" TEXT /* Date the nominee was confirmed */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court to which the nominee is assigned */,
  "incumbent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the incumbent judge being replaced */,
  "vacancy_reason_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reason for the vacancy */,
  "vacancy_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy occurred */,
  "nominee_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the nominee */,
  "nominee_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the nominee */,
  "nominated_by" TEXT /* The entity or person who nominated the nominee */,
  "confirmation_status" TEXT /* Current status of the confirmation process */,
  "confirmation_details" TEXT /* Details about the confirmation process */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nominee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_vacancy_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacancy_reason_id") REFERENCES vacancy_reasons ("vacancy_reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nominees_incumbent_id FOREIGN KEY ("incumbent_id") REFERENCES incumbents ("incumbent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courts" (
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court */,
  "court_name" TEXT /* Name of the court (e.g., 01 - CCA) */,
  "court_level" TEXT /* Level of the court (e.g., Circuit Court of Appeals, District Court) */,
  "court_location" TEXT /* Location of the court */,
  "court_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the court */,
  "court_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the court */,
  "court_website" TEXT /* URL of the court's official website */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courts_court_level FOREIGN KEY ("court_level") REFERENCES court_levels ("court_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incumbents" (
  "incumbent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incumbent */,
  "incumbent_name" TEXT /* Full name of the incumbent judge */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court where the incumbent served */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the incumbent started their term */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the incumbent ended their term */,
  "incumbent_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the incumbent */,
  "incumbent_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the incumbent */,
  "incumbent_birthday" TEXT /* Date of birth of the incumbent */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incumbent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incumbents_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacancy_reasons" (
  "vacancy_reason_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacancy reason */,
  "vacancy_reason_name" TEXT /* Name of the vacancy reason (e.g., Deceased, Senior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the vacancy reason */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vacancy reason is currently active */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_reason_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, clerk, external stakeholder) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Biographical information about the user */,
  "user_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the record */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., nominee, vacancy) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from the access request */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vacancies" (
  "vacancy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vacancy */,
  "court_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the court where the vacancy occurred */,
  "vacancy_reason_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the reason for the vacancy */,
  "vacancy_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy occurred */,
  "filled_by_nominee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the nominee who filled the vacancy */,
  "filled_date" TEXT /* Date the vacancy was filled */,
  "vacancy_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the vacancy */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the vacancy is currently active */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vacancy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancies_vacancy_reason_id FOREIGN KEY ("vacancy_reason_id") REFERENCES vacancy_reasons ("vacancy_reason_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancies_court_id FOREIGN KEY ("court_id") REFERENCES courts ("court_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vacancies_filled_by_nominee_id FOREIGN KEY ("filled_by_nominee_id") REFERENCES nominees ("nominee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "court_levels" (
  "court_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each court level */,
  "court_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the court level (e.g., Circuit Court of Appeals, District Court) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the court level */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the court level is currently active */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("court_level_id")
)
